## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Yourco and GrowthX to discuss SEO performance, content strategy, and conversion optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/-8gMKAF2ynk4zwxYn6ZawvsDTWS_CpUa?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO traffic showing steady growth in impressions (10x YoY) but clicks lagging; focus on improving 0.5% conversion rate](https://fathom.video/share/-8gMKAF2ynk4zwxYn6ZawvsDTWS_CpUa?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Call-off management and translation features are key differentiators driving conversions; more emphasis needed](https://fathom.video/share/-8gMKAF2ynk4zwxYn6ZawvsDTWS_CpUa?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - [Website updates planned to showcase product features more prominently and add customer success stories](https://fathom.video/share/-8gMKAF2ynk4zwxYn6ZawvsDTWS_CpUa?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Analysis

  - [Impressions up 10x year-over-year, reaching 1.3M](https://fathom.video/share/-8gMKAF2ynk4zwxYn6ZawvsDTWS_CpUa?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [Clicks growing steadily but at slower pace than impressions](https://fathom.video/share/-8gMKAF2ynk4zwxYn6ZawvsDTWS_CpUa?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Conversion rate \~0.5%, goal to reach 1%+ industry benchmark](https://fathom.video/share/-8gMKAF2ynk4zwxYn6ZawvsDTWS_CpUa?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [Recent dip likely due to seasonality (back-to-school); not cause for major concern](https://fathom.video/share/-8gMKAF2ynk4zwxYn6ZawvsDTWS_CpUa?tab=summary&timestamp=299.0)

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [Surveys/templates and how-to content performing best](https://fathom.video/share/-8gMKAF2ynk4zwxYn6ZawvsDTWS_CpUa?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [Focusing on call-off management and translation use cases](https://fathom.video/share/-8gMKAF2ynk4zwxYn6ZawvsDTWS_CpUa?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - [Adding more product images and considering GIFs/videos to showcase features](https://fathom.video/share/-8gMKAF2ynk4zwxYn6ZawvsDTWS_CpUa?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
  - [Planning customer success stories, targeting enterprise clients](https://fathom.video/share/-8gMKAF2ynk4zwxYn6ZawvsDTWS_CpUa?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)

### Conversion Rate Optimization

  - [Testing newsletter sign-up placement (currently too low on page)](https://fathom.video/share/-8gMKAF2ynk4zwxYn6ZawvsDTWS_CpUa?tab=summary&timestamp=1180.0)
  - [Considering sticky side panel or bottom bar for CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/-8gMKAF2ynk4zwxYn6ZawvsDTWS_CpUa?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)
  - [Tracking performance of specific CTA URLs](https://fathom.video/share/-8gMKAF2ynk4zwxYn6ZawvsDTWS_CpUa?tab=summary&timestamp=1989.0)

### Technical SEO Issues

  - [Persistent indexing problem with call-off management page](https://fathom.video/share/-8gMKAF2ynk4zwxYn6ZawvsDTWS_CpUa?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)
  - [Plan to republish under new URL if not resolved soon](https://fathom.video/share/-8gMKAF2ynk4zwxYn6ZawvsDTWS_CpUa?tab=summary&timestamp=1614.0)

### AI/LLM Considerations

  - [Implementing LLMs.txt file this week](https://fathom.video/share/-8gMKAF2ynk4zwxYn6ZawvsDTWS_CpUa?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
  - [Seeing increased traffic from ChatGPT, Gemini, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/-8gMKAF2ynk4zwxYn6ZawvsDTWS_CpUa?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Optimizing content for AI discoverability (FAQ schema, direct answers)](https://fathom.video/share/-8gMKAF2ynk4zwxYn6ZawvsDTWS_CpUa?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

## Next Steps

  - Carrie to share updated Looker dashboard with detailed performance metrics
  - [Review and publish 1-2 survey templates in next two weeks](https://fathom.video/share/-8gMKAF2ynk4zwxYn6ZawvsDTWS_CpUa?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [Bump up CTA placement on blog posts for better visibility](https://fathom.video/share/-8gMKAF2ynk4zwxYn6ZawvsDTWS_CpUa?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)
  - [Prioritize website updates to showcase product features more prominently](https://fathom.video/share/-8gMKAF2ynk4zwxYn6ZawvsDTWS_CpUa?tab=summary&timestamp=2310.0)
  - [Kyle and Carrie to brainstorm additional content ideas around key use cases](https://fathom.video/share/-8gMKAF2ynk4zwxYn6ZawvsDTWS_CpUa?tab=summary&timestamp=2411.0)
  - [Continue monitoring indexing issue with call-off management page](https://fathom.video/share/-8gMKAF2ynk4zwxYn6ZawvsDTWS_CpUa?tab=summary&timestamp=1614.0)
